payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Do not commit this as durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' matches the existing memory surface form, but the new kinship relation conflicts with the stored one. Without disambiguation, it is unsafe to assume this is the same person or to overwrite the existing memory.

details: No new durable memory card was created.
Existing memory was not overwritten or restated as updated.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different Sara with the same name.
If it is the same person, ask which relationship is correct: daughter or niece.
If they are different people, request a disambiguating label (for example, 'Sara Smith' vs 'Sara Johnson').
